race.comment: DEADLY PRESS (2) had been threatening before breaking through for a deserved win last time over 1400m at Seymour, scoring by a head. Winning rider Daniel Stackhouse sticks. Should be in the finish despite a slight rise in grade. INFINITE JEST (6) was in the placings at his first two runs this preparation before breaking through over 1614m at this track last time. Will be handy despite the tricky draw. Winning claims on best figures. ASEVENTY SEVEN (1), on the other hand, is used to racing in stronger races than this and will have come on for the first-up run, so suited up to this trip. SOTOMAYOR (7) was beaten a long way first-up but that was in a handy race and he'll appreciate the step out in trip.
